client_brief.goal: How do I scope a 2-week research sprint for a climate-tech founder who needs decision-ready clarity, not an academic tome?
client_brief.title: 2-week climate-tech research sprint

assumptions: Client provides access to source materials within 48h
Primary language is English unless specified

acceptance_criteria: Answers the core question in plain language
Includes next actions the client can execute
proposal_spine: You need clarity on «2-week climate-tech research sprint». I will turn the fog into a claim lattice, a decision-ready memo, and a scoped next step—so you can act without false certainty.
